free_text: Role of exchange effects in elastic scattering of
alpha particles and of 3He ions by 6Li nuclei.
English translation
Tabulated data.
Ionizing chamber or flight semiconductor
counters with the thickness of 30-100 mu-m were used
as dE-detectors. Semiconductor counter with the
thickness of 1-3 mm was used as E-detector.
Foils of metallic lithium enriched in 6Li to 90.9% were
coated on thin (~0.2 mu-m) organic films by thermal
sputtering in vacuum. Thicknesses of targets in
different experiments varied from 0.1 to 0.5 mg/cm2.
Relative errors were determined mostly
by statistical accuracy. Error in absolute cross
section definition was due to uncertainty in target
thickness which was determined by weighing
immediately after measurement performance.
English translation in REFERENCE was added.
ERR-ANALYS in sub 001 was corrected. DETECTOR was
corrected. DATA-ERR from sub 002-003 was replaced by
DATA-ERR1. Data presentation in sub 002-003 was
changed.
Digitized data for 50,60 MeV ions were
replaced by tabulated data. Sub 004, 005 were added.
Data presentation in sub 002, 003 was changed.
Error from the graphic bars. No source of
uncertainty is given.

replaced by tabulated data, see Sub 004.
Error from the graphic bars. No source of
uncertainty is given.
